summary: Single-page web app called 'Mathematical Encryption Model' implementing affine cipher encryption/decryption (E(x) = (3x + 5) mod 26) with a clean academic UI, explanation panel, and copy functionality — all in a single index.html file using vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.
architectural_notes: Single index.html file with inline CSS and JS — no external dependencies, works via file:// protocol
Affine cipher: Encryption E(x) = (3x + 5) mod 26, Decryption D(x) = 9(x − 5) mod 26; letters only, case preserved
UI: header, input card, encrypt/decrypt buttons, output card with two sections, accordion explanation panel
Design: white cards on light gray/blue bg, deep navy/indigo accent, Inter or system fonts, mobile responsive

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a single frontend file (frontend/public/index.html or equivalent static entry) containing a fully self-contained single-page app titled 'Mathematical Encryption Model' with all CSS in a <style> tag and all logic in a <script> tag — no external JS libraries, no build tools, works via file:// protocol.

Implement affine cipher encryption using E(x) = (3x + 5) mod 26 and decryption using D(x) = 9(x − 5) mod 26. Only A–Z and a–z are transformed; spaces, digits, and punctuation pass through unchanged. Original letter case must be preserved in the output.

Build the interface layout with five sections: (1) Header with title 'Mathematical Encryption Model' and a subtle subtitle; (2) Input Card with a textarea labeled 'Enter Message'; (3) Button Row with 'Encrypt' and 'Decrypt' buttons side by side; (4) Output Card with two sub-sections — 'Encrypted Text' and 'Decrypted Text' — each showing a result field with a copy-to-clipboard button; (5) Explanation Panel as an accordion with four entries: letter-to-number mapping (A=0…Z=25), modular arithmetic overview, why 9 is the modular inverse of 3 mod 26 (3×9=27≡1 mod 26), and how encryption protects digital data.

Apply a minimal academic design: white cards on a light gray-blue background, accent color deep navy or indigo, rounded corners (border-radius), soft box shadows on cards, easy-to-read typography (Inter via Google Fonts with system-font fallback), subtle hover animations on buttons, and a subtle reveal animation when results appear. Ensure full mobile responsiveness with appropriate max-width media queries.
